heading: Report to Congress
label: 1964 Report to Congress
text: The President shall whenever appropriate report to the Congress his action hereunder.
notes: Amendments1961— substituted “whenever appropriate” for “within the months of January and July of each year”.Pub. L. 87–195

Repeals, cited as a credit to this section, was repealed by , pt. IV, , , except insofar as section 705 affected this section.Section 705 of Pub. L. 87–195section 401 of Pub. L. 87–56576 Stat. 263Aug. 1, 1962
